hearts.title: Your three hearts
hearts.body: Each day below 50% completion costs one heart. Three consecutive days at 50% or more earns one back. Lose all three and the app nudges you to restart smaller.

ring.title: Today's progress
ring.body: This ring fills as you log habits. It includes any shared habits from your workspaces too — your own completions count, your partners' don't.

checklist.title: Tap to log a habit
checklist.body: One tap on a habit's circle marks it done. The list resets each morning. Tap the row itself for more options + the compound effect of that habit.

addHabit.title: Add a habit
addHabit.body: Build your own list. Pick from presets like Fajr, 10 pages, or 30-minute walk — or write your own. Bad habits get a built-in good-deed pairing.

rewards.title: Rewards and punishments
rewards.body: Pick a small reward for hitting daily 100% and a 7-day streak, and a punishment (like a small charity donation) for missing a critical habit. The carrot and the stick — both are how this app keeps you honest.

reset.title: Dopamine reset
reset.body: Pause a bad habit for 24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, or 90 days. Track stages, daily check-ins, and replacement activities to rebuild your baseline so good habits feel rewarding again.

workspaces.title: Track together
workspaces.body: Habits you keep with a partner, family or small group land here. Each member logs their own tap; you can see who's done what today. Tap Open to set one up.

categories.title: Categories
categories.body: Habits sorted by life area — Islamic, Health, Sport, Finance, Career, Growth, Relationships. Add your own. Tap a category for its full habit set.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.body: Year heatmap, 14-day chart, per-habit streaks. The honest mirror of where consistency is and where it isn't.

futureSelf.title: Your future self
futureSelf.body: The person you're becoming — vision, why, your overall streak fire, and the compound effects of every habit over a year and a decade.

books.title: Your reading
books.body: Books in progress, pages logged, the year-end review. If a habit is linked to books, every page logged here counts toward its daily total.

profile.title: Profile + settings
profile.body: Edit your name, future-self vision, why. Switch language, theme, prayer city. Sign out. Replay this tour anytime from here.

moreFeatures.title: A few more to explore
moreFeatures.body: Rewards and punishments, Ramadan mode (auto-on during Ramadan), spiritual fasting, autophagy timer, debts and savings ledgers, the dopamine reset hub, and the restart-smaller flow when life gets in the way. Nothing forced — everything optional. Open Categories or Profile to find them when you want.
